title: phaseolus coccineus var. strigillosus
intro: Phaseolus coccineus var. strigillosus, commonly known as the scarlet runner bean, is a variety of the scarlet runner plant that belongs to the bean family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Phaseolus coccineus var. strigillosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and promote overall well-being.
